gaps: AC-1: resolvePressureProfile used prototype severity buckets instead of bTIAw three-branch logic
AC-2: calculateUserPressureProfile did not map AUTH-05 slugs to Bubble-parity pressure_profile_text

evidence: frontend/src/lib/userProfile/buildPressureProfile.ts — resolvePressureProfile implements bTIAw branches: high-intensity join (bTIBH), wired low-external (bTICE), default low-pressure (bTICC)
frontend/src/lib/enums/onboardingQuestions.ts — per-answer intensity + loadType + high_intensity_text metadata for ENUM-02 slugs
frontend/src/lib/userProfile/buildPressureProfile.test.ts — five branch fixtures covering all three paths

frontend/src/lib/userProfile/calculateUserPressureProfile.ts — reads onboarding_data.loadSignals and stateSignals.nervous_system_state from AUTH-05, calls resolvePressureProfile, patches pressure_profile_text and results.pressure_profile
